BPL 2026 Crisis: 7 Shocking Events That Forced a Reschedule

Jan 16, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

BPL 2026 Crisis: 7 Shocking Events That Forced a Reschedule

BPL 2026 was thrown into turmoil after an unprecedented players-led protest forced the Bangladesh Cricket Board to reschedule matches and remove a senior official, triggering one of the biggest governance crises in Bangladesh cricket history.
